title: Illumination device of vehicle
abstract: An illumination device (100) of a vehicle (10) is provided. The illumination device (100) comprises a housing member (102), an enclosing member (110) and a printed circuit board (106) having a plurality of illumination members (104). The illumination device (100) further comprises an illumination directing assembly (108) having a plate member assembly (139) and a blocking member (160). The plate member assembly (139) comprises a bottom plate (142) and at least two illumination directing plate members (150) disposed on one side of the bottom plate (142). Each one of the at least two illumination directing plate members (150) comprises a curved free end (156). The curved free end (156) of the at least two illumination directing plate members (150) is configured to allow light emitted by the by the plurality of illumination members (104) to pass there through.
claims:
Claims We claim: 1. An illumination device (100) of a vehicle (10) comprising: a housing member (102); an enclosing member (110) coupled to front of the housing member (102), wherein the enclosing member (110) and the housing member (102) collectively define a cavity (103); a printed circuit board (106) disposed within the cavity (103), wherein the printed circuit board (106) comprises a plurality of illumination members (104) configured to emit light in the first direction (Dl) towards the enclosing member (110); an illumination directing assembly (108) disposed within the cavity (103) and ahead of the printed circuit board (106), wherein the illumination directing assembly (108) comprises: a plate member assembly (139) comprising: a bottom plate (142) configured to allow light emitted by the plurality of illumination members (104) there through; and at least two illumination directing plate members (150) disposed on one side of the bottom plate (142) and extends towards the enclosing member (110), wherein each one of the at least two illumination directing plate members (150) comprises a curved free end (156); and a blocking member ( 160) comprising plurality of insertion slots (162), wherein the at least two illumination directing plate members (150) extends through the plurality of insertion slots (162), wherein the blocking member (160) is configured to restrict light transmitting from the bottom plate (142) except through the plurality of the insertion slots (162); and 

 wherein the curved free end (156) of the at least two illumination directing plate members (150) is configured to allow light emitted by the by the plurality of illumination members (104) to pass there through. 2. The illumination device (100) of the vehicle (10) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the bottom plate (142) comprises a set of connecting protrusions (144) configured to couple the plate member assembly (139) to the housing member (102). 3. The illumination device (100) of the vehicle (10) as claimed in claim 2, wherein the illumination directing assembly (108) comprises a top illumination directing plate (136) and a bottom illumination directing plate (138), wherein the top illumination directing plate (136) comprises at least one mounting flange (141), wherein the mounting flanges (141) are mounted to the set of connecting protrusions (144). 4. The illumination device (100) of the vehicle (10) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the plurality of illumination members (104) include a top set of illumination members (130), a bottom set of illumination members (132), and a middle set of illumination members (134) positioned between the top set of illumination members (130) and the bottom set of illumination members (132). 5. The illumination device (100) of the vehicle (10) as claimed in claim 3, wherein the top illumination directing plate (136) are disposed ahead of the top set of illumination members (130), the bottom directing plate (138) is disposed ahead of the bottom set of illumination members (132) and the plate member assembly (139) is disposed ahead of the middle set of illumination members (134). 6. The illumination device (100) of the vehicle (10) as claimed in claim 3, wherein each of the top illumination directing plate (136), the bottom illumination directing plate (138), the at least two illumination direction plate members (150) 

 and the bottom plate (142) is made of acrylic material such asâPoly (Methyl Methacrylate)â. 7. The illumination device (100) of the vehicle (10) as claimed in the claim 1, wherein curved profile of the curved free ends (156) of the illumination directing plate members (150), imparts a depth to the visual output, and the illumination output appears to be three-dimensional appear to the viewer as a three- dimensional.
